title: Project Armageddon
description: A Survival SMP project with a different twist every season.
body:
# **Welcome to Project Armageddon**
**Project Armageddon redefines survival SMP with a new twist every season, ensuring no two adventures are ever the same. Each chapter brings fresh challenges, unexpected mechanics, and evolving gameplay that keep players on their toes. Whether you’re battling through chaos, forging alliances, or adapting to the unknown, Project Armageddon transforms survival into an unpredictable journey where strategy, creativity, and resilience are the keys to victory.**



# FAQ
## How does it work?
**You the Player can join the Discord and bring up Ideas what the next Twist of the Upcoming Season is going to be! _(Yes we event stupid ones, we had a few Stupid ones that made it.)_ Other Players can Upvote your Idea and once Voting Phase is over the 5 Highest Upvoted Ideas will be thrown together in an Poll. Whatever Idea has the most Votes will be selected as the "New Twist" for the upcoming Season!**



## Can i take Part of it?
**Its a little complicated. To be Part of the Private Project Armageddon you need to be someone i know or someone Trusted in our Community. Since there are alot of stupid People out there and due to the Project beeing Recorded we do not want an N-Bomb ruining the entire Project. We do have a Public Server for the Project available to anyone whos interested!**



## Can i use custom Mods while playing on the Server?
**We cannot prevent you from using Client Sided Mods that you yourself add to the Modpack. As long as it does not give you an Advantage or a way to annoy People, feel free todo whatever.**


## How long is each Season?
**Tho there is no specific Time the Season goes on we try to keep it between 6 - 8 Months.**



# Past Seasons
> **Season 1 - Anarchy Season** | 
> Hardcore Mode, Griefing, No Rules, No Chat, No Tablist, Pure Chaos; _(Least favorite, moderating this so its not going TOO FAR was a struggle fr fr)_

> **Season 2 - Factions Season** | 
> Multiple Factions, War, Set Rules, Roleplay Elements; _(I died 277 Times in this Season...)_

> **Season 3 - Chill Season** | 
> Little to No PvP, PvE, No Griefing, Building, Exploring, Adventure; _(Most enjoyed by all overall)_

> **Season 4 - The Exploit Season** | 
> Exploiting, Cheating, PvP, Drama, Chaos, Broken Friendships; _(Im serious)_

> **Season 5 - The Custom Season** | 
> Own selfmade Mods, PvP, Massive Roleplay Elements; _(Smth like Content SMP)_

> **Season 6 - The RPG Season** | 
> RPG Elements, Roleplay, PvP, PvE, Story with Ending, Server reunion; _(My fav. Season of them all tbh)_

> **Season 7 - The Enhanced Hardcore Season** | 
> Overhauled PvP Animations, Hardcore, Custom Mobs. _(Pretty nice Season tbh)_
